messages.content:
DigiRL和ZeroGUI分别为当前GUI轨迹Reward方法中LLM-as-Judge最典型的两种框架，现有的其他Critic Framework都只是在这两种方法基础上进行工程上的简单修改，因此我们选用这两个框架进行比较。ZeroGUI是经典的直接取N个状态，包括图片、网页信息等直接传入模型进行判断的决策方式，在这里用的是最后两张图。DigiRL是另一种方法，从前往后逐一判断状态是否满足目标，直到某一状态达成目标或者全部判断完毕失败为止。
\paragraph{Main Results}
We evaluate a range of models on OmniGUIRewardBench under three LLM-as-Judge frameworks—
ame\ and two widely used baselines, DigiRL and ZeroGUI. As reported in Table~ef{tab:OmniGUIRewardBench_Simple}, we measure accuracy across different platforms, and further include precision and recall to better characterize performance differences among frameworks. Across all tested base models, 
ame\ consistently achieves the best results in both accuracy and precision compared to the other frameworks. On average, 
ame\ outperforms DigiRL by 18.8\%, 29.6\%, 16.9\%, and 26.2\% in accuracy, precision, recall and F1-score, respectively, and surpasses ZeroGUI by 7.7\%, 5.1\%, 13.0\%, and 13.4\% on the same metrics.翻译下，把中文这部分翻译了插入英文这部分中

Here is the translation integrated into your LaTeX paragraph. I have adjusted the phrasing slightly to ensure it flows smoothly in an academic context.

\paragraph{Main Results}
We evaluate a range of models on OmniGUIRewardBench under three LLM-as-Judge frameworks—\name\ and two widely used baselines, DigiRL and ZeroGUI. **DigiRL and ZeroGUI represent the two most typical LLM-as-a-Judge frameworks for GUI trajectory reward modeling; since other existing critic frameworks are largely engineering variations of these two, we selected them as our primary baselines for comparison. ZeroGUI adopts a classic decision-making approach by directly sampling $N$ states (comprising screenshots and webpage information) for model input—specifically utilizing the final two frames in this context. In contrast, DigiRL employs a sequential verification method, evaluating states one by one to determine if the objective is met, terminating either upon success or when the trajectory ends in failure.** As reported in Table~\ref{tab:OmniGUIRewardBench_Simple}, we measure accuracy across different platforms, and further include precision and recall to better characterize performance differences among frameworks. Across all tested base models, \name\ consistently achieves the best results in both accuracy and precision compared to the other frameworks. On average, \name\ outperforms DigiRL by 18.8\%, 29.6\%, 16.9\%, and 26.2\% in accuracy, precision, recall and F1-score, respectively, and surpasses ZeroGUI by 7.7\%, 5.1\%, 13.0\%, and 13.4\% on the same metrics.

***

**Key Translation Choices (for your reference):**
*   **工程上的简单修改:** Translated as "largely engineering variations" or "minor engineering adaptations" to sound more academic than "simple engineering modifications."
*   **最后两张图:** Translated as "the final two frames" (common in vision-language contexts) or "screenshots."
*   **从前往后逐一判断:** Translated as "sequential verification method" or "evaluating states one by one."
webpage information换下，是页面信息，包括web、html、a11tree、xml等
